Notice Of Hearing On Motion To Correct And Confirm The Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BENJAMIN SHIFTAN OF SEDGWICK LLP, TEL. NO. 627-1584 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER JAMES DIWIK's Motion To Correct And Confirm The Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR BY THE MOVING PARTY.
